What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Adams Tree Service did an amazing job trimming our large oak tree. They were professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything perfectly. Our tree looks healthier than ever!

D
David K.

We had a large, dead tree that needed to be removed. Adams Tree Service gave us a fair price and completed the job safely and quickly. The team was very careful to avoid damaging our fence.

E
Emily R.

I was so happy with the stump grinding service! They completely removed the old stump from our backyard, and now we can finally plant a garden. The crew was friendly and professional.

J
John L.

During a recent storm, a large branch fell on our roof. Adams Tree Service responded immediately and removed the branch quickly and safely. I highly recommend them for emergency services!

Adams Tree Service — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every tree service project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Adams Tree Service Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific tree service needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Oklahoma City & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Oklahoma City, OK and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Oklahoma City Edmond Moore Norman Midwest City Del City Yukon Mustang
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our tree service services.

How often should I have my trees trimmed?

The frequency of tree trimming depends on the species, age, and health of the tree. Generally, mature trees should be trimmed every 3-5 years, while younger trees may require more frequent pruning to establish a strong structure. We can assess your trees and recommend a suitable trimming schedule.

What is the difference between trimming and pruning?

Trimming generally refers to the removal of smaller branches and twigs to maintain shape and appearance. Pruning involves the removal of larger branches to improve tree health, structure, or safety. Both are essential for proper tree care.

Can I trim my trees myself?

While it's possible to trim smaller trees yourself, it's generally recommended to hire a professional for larger trees or complex pruning jobs. Improper trimming can damage the tree and create safety hazards. Our team has the expertise and equipment to perform tree trimming safely and effectively.

Built on Oklahoma City Values

Contact us today to schedule a consultation and learn how we can help you maintain healthy, beautiful trees.
